channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-23T20:10Z — 768 outages, 16,776 customers, 544 fair-weather, 10 DC-proximate
item.description: GA-GPC: 2174 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NC-DEC: 1394 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NJ-PSEG: 1359 cust (NEAR OPERATING DC FAIR-WEATH) | VAWV-APCO: 454 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
